stages.diagnosis: Smelting failed because the wrong command was used (!smelt_item with a fuel argument) instead of the available !smeltItem, and the bot never explicitly moved to a furnace. There is a furnace nearby and enough planks to fuel 3 ingots. Move to the furnace and use the correct smelt action.

collectBlocks on stone kept failing likely because no pickaxe was equipped, even though stone is nearby. Equip the specified wooden pickaxe, then mine stone to yield cobblestone; inventory already exceeds the required amount so this should complete quickly.

The plan kept trying to collect "stone", which doesn’t drop as stone and likely caused the collection command to fail. We already have a pickaxe and are standing on stone, so directly mining will yield cobblestone. Equip the wooden pickaxe as specified and dig down to gather the required cobblestone.

The plan called the wrong action (!smelt_item) and tried to smelt 3 despite having only 1 raw iron. There is already a furnace nearby and you have planks for fuel, so just smelt the single raw iron using the correct action.

The bot tried an unsupported search command and never located lava. We should properly search for a lava block within a large radius, then use the bucket on it. Temporarily disabling self preservation avoids the mode interrupting the interaction.

The bucket was used on nearby lava multiple times but likely on flowing lava, not a source block, so it never filled. Move to the exact lava source coordinates and interact again to collect a lava bucket.
